vibe: Premium, investor-ready, $100M VC-backed SaaS, cinematic, authoritative.

hierarchy.hero: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-[6vw] font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight

layout.style: Asymmetric bento grids, left-aligned typography, generous negative space.
layout.borders: 1px solid border-black/10 on cards, pure sharp edges.
layout.shadows: None. Rely on 1px borders and high contrast background shifts.

principles: Scroll choreography: use ScrollTrigger for pinned sections and parallax.
Staggered reveals: Lists and bento items fade and slide up sequentially.
Text Scramble: Use on data loading states (like CTC numbers) for a 'computation' feel.
Marquee: Slow organic drift for top recruiters ribbon.

components.button: Sharp rectangles, high contrast. Primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-signature_accent. No border radius.
components.card: bg-white border border-black/10 p-8. Hover effect: slight translate-y-1 and border-black/30.
components.input: Shadcn based but highly customized. Sharp rectangle with border-black/20 focus:border-black focus:ring-0.
components.table: Editorial style. No vertical borders. Generous row padding. Mono font for numbers/IDs.
components.chart: Recharts. Monochrome lines with signature_accent (#FF3B00) for the main data point. Minimal grid lines.
components.sidebar: Left-aligned, strict grid, uppercase overline category headers, highly legible.

landing.hero: Pinned GSAP section. Left-aligned massive 'Cabinet Grotesk' text. Scramble text effect on 'Placement Intelligence'.
landing.marquee: Slow editorial ribbon of top recruiters (Amazon, Google, ServiceNow, Intuit) in JetBrains Mono.
landing.feature_reveal: Pinned left column with changing text, right column scrolls through feature images (dashboard screenshots).
landing.stats_strip: Parallax section showing KMIT stats: 148 Companies, 702 Offers, 8.26 LPA Avg, 80L Top.

auth.layout: 50/50 split. Left side: immersive image of modern university architecture. Right side: minimal form with Google OAuth button.

dashboard_shell.layout: Command-center. Fixed left sidebar. Main content area with top nav (breadcrumbs + profile).
dashboard_shell.sidebar: Clean, black text on off-white. Active state uses signature_accent left border.

tpo_dashboard.kpi_cards: Bento layout. North star metric top-left (e.g., 'Total Offers'). Use mono font for numbers.
tpo_dashboard.charts: CTC Trends (Line Chart), Offers by Dept (Bar Chart). Clean, no-frills tooltips.

student_roster.features: Filter/Sort bar. Table with Student ID, Name, Dept, Status (Placed/Unplaced). 'data-testid' on all rows.

program_cohort.layout: Bento boxes for CRT, Interview Master, FDP. Progress rings for completion rates.

placement_outcomes.layout: Heavy data page. Heatmap for recruiter vs department. Company logos grid.

training_completion.layout: List view. Student rows with linear progress bars indicating training module completion.

mou_management.upload_zone: Massive drag-and-drop dashed rectangle. Countdown timer for 'Days until renewal' in large mono font.

super_admin.layout: Dense table view for approving colleges. Override data actions.

images.description: Modern corporate university building with curved glass facade
Diverse group of college students chatting outside a modern university building
Students looking at phones in a lecture hall

tech_stack.frontend: React, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Radix UI (Shadcn)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT USE ANY BLUE OR TEAL OR PURPLE.
Implement the Layout using CSS Grid and Flexbox with heavy padding (e.g., p-8 or p-12 on cards).
Typography: Import Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and Satoshi for Body. Use JetBrains Mono for numbers/metrics. NEVER USE INTER.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
For the dashboard, use the side-nav layout. Ensure active states are clearly visible with the signature_accent color (#FF3B00).

Seed the app with the specific KMIT data provided: 2025-26: 148 companies, 702 offers, 8.26 LPA avg, top 80L Amazon; 2024-25 Google 52L, Amazon 46L, ServiceNow 42L; 2023-24 Intuit 49.8L, Salesforce 47L.
Integrate GSAP for the landing page: pinned scroll sections, text reveals, and a marquee for the recruiters.
Implement the 7 top features specified plus the Super Admin view and Google OAuth integration.
